title: Analytics Gen Configuration
description: Main configuration file for analytics_gen code generator. Defines inputs, outputs, targets, rules, naming strategy, and meta field injection settings.

analytics_gen.title: Analytics Gen Root
analytics_gen.description: Root configuration object. All settings are nested under this key.

inputs.title: Input Configuration
inputs.description: Configures where analytics_gen reads its source YAML files.

events.title: Events Path
events.description: Path to directory containing YAML event files (relative to project root).

shared_parameters.title: Shared Parameters Paths
shared_parameters.description: List of paths to shared parameter definition files.

contexts.title: Context Paths
contexts.description: List of paths to context definition files (user properties, theme, etc.).

imports.title: Custom Imports
imports.description: List of custom Dart import URIs to include in generated files.

outputs.title: Output Configuration
outputs.description: Configures where analytics_gen writes generated files.

dart.title: Dart Output Path
dart.description: Path where generated Dart code will be written (relative to project root).

docs.title: Documentation Output Path
docs.description: Path where documentation will be generated (optional). Required when generate_docs target is enabled.

exports.title: Exports Output Path
exports.description: Path where database exports (CSV, JSON, SQL) will be generated (optional). Required when CSV/JSON/SQL targets are enabled.

studio.title: Studio Project Output Path
studio.description: Path where the AnalyticsGen Studio project file will be written. Required when the studio target is enabled.

targets.title: Generation Targets
targets.description: Toggles for which output artifacts to generate.

csv.title: Generate CSV
csv.description: Whether to generate CSV export of events and parameters.

json.title: Generate JSON
json.description: Whether to generate JSON export of events and parameters.

sql.title: Generate SQL
sql.description: Whether to generate SQL export (e.g., BigQuery schema).

docs.title: Generate Documentation
docs.description: Whether to generate Markdown documentation from event definitions.

plan.title: Generate Tracking Plan
plan.description: Whether to include the runtime tracking plan in generated Dart code.

test_matchers.title: Generate Test Matchers
test_matchers.description: Whether to generate test matchers for `package:test` to verify analytics calls in tests.

studio.title: Generate Studio Project File
studio.description: Whether to generate an `analytics-studio.json` project file importable by AnalyticsGen Studio. Output path is configured via `outputs.studio`.

rules.title: Validation & Generation Rules
rules.description: Rules that control validation strictness and generation behavior.

include_event_description.title: Include Event Description
include_event_description.description: Whether to include the event 'description' field as a parameter in the generated analytics map.

strict_event_names.title: Strict Event Names
strict_event_names.description: Whether to treat string interpolation characters ('{', '}') in event names as an error. Prevents high-cardinality dynamic event names.

enforce_centrally_defined_parameters.title: Enforce Centrally Defined Parameters
enforce_centrally_defined_parameters.description: Whether to enforce that ALL parameters must be defined in shared parameter files. Inline parameter definitions in events will cause an error.

prevent_event_parameter_duplicates.title: Prevent Event Parameter Duplicates
prevent_event_parameter_duplicates.description: Whether to prevent defining parameters in events that already exist in shared parameter files. Forces use of the shared version.

naming.title: Naming Strategy
naming.description: Controls how domains, events, and parameters are named in generated code and analytics output.

casing.title: Event Name Casing
casing.description: The naming convention applied to generated event names.

enforce_snake_case_domains.title: Enforce Snake Case Domains
enforce_snake_case_domains.description: Whether to validate that domain keys are snake_case (pattern: ^[a-z0-9_]+$).

enforce_snake_case_parameters.title: Enforce Snake Case Parameters
enforce_snake_case_parameters.description: Whether to validate that parameter identifiers are snake_case (pattern: ^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$).

event_name_template.title: Event Name Template
event_name_template.description: Template for generating event names. Supports placeholders: {domain}, {domain_alias}, {event}.

identifier_template.title: Identifier Template
identifier_template.description: Template for generating canonical event identifiers (used for uniqueness checks). Supports the same placeholders as event_name_template.

domain_aliases.title: Domain Aliases
domain_aliases.description: Map of domain name to alias. When present, {domain_alias} in templates resolves to the mapped value instead of the domain name.

meta.title: Meta Configuration
meta.description: Configuration for automatic meta field injection into generated events.

auto_tracking_creation_date.title: Auto Track Creation Date
auto_tracking_creation_date.description: Whether to automatically track event creation dates via a ledger file. Records when each event was first seen.

include_meta_in_parameters.title: Include Meta in Parameters
include_meta_in_parameters.description: Whether to include event meta fields (added_in, deprecated_in, etc.) in the generated event parameters map.

events_path.title: Events Path (flat alias)
events_path.description: Flat alias for inputs.events. If both are set, inputs.events takes precedence.
